textByHashes.a36f4145509da2769bfdffda20570860f7786917: Hi. Welcome to the general store. How might I help you?
textByHashes.122cc9072eca71a81f697a13d18731fc7748b6b4: I said about magic of course. You know, in response to your question.
textByHashes.3d38c4417b1632579393d9d3797d55c6b4951ba4: Yes, but you were thinking of asking me how I was floating.
textByHashes.7d0ad72d3ba40feeef452589826b30d95922d2b5: Don't you realise we can read your mind.
textByHashes.620f68fd4f2cc034bbf0e43bbd694e0bc2aa4c93: It's quite simple, everyone has a resonance that is responded to by the moon. This resonance changes depending on what we are thinking. You can tune yourself in to listen to this resonance with practice - it's
textByHashes.9d9ac7cc38362c1021899fc9fcdba9e32d482139: a life long quest for the members of the Moon Clan, but its especially easy to read with outsiders like yourself, as you are far louder and unguarded.
